x.Description: Contact x coordinate; unavailable in the source release.

y.Description: Contact y coordinate; unavailable in the source release.

z.Description: Contact z coordinate; unavailable in the source release.

group.Description: Electrode shaft or grid group inferred from channel name.

seizure_onset_zone.Description: Original seizure-onset-zone code for the source contact.

Levels.2: source code 2; meaning is not specified in the segmented release

anatomical_label.Description: Anatomical label from segments.csv, or n/a.
